name: 30" Pre-Lit Icy Glittered Planter Artificial Christmas tree - Wondershop™
description:
Add a charming, wintry centerpiece to your holiday setup with this 30-Inch Pre-Lit Icy Glittered Planter Artificial Christmas tree from Wondershop™. This artificial tree showcases a dense arrangement of mixed icy glittered green sprigs and white berries and is adorned with white LED bulbs for celebratory sparkle. Place it in any decorative pot for elegant display indoors or in a sheltered outdoor location.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
